assertions.assertion: Uses AddPostgreSqlStore() with a connection string inside AddUserManagement options
Explains that no EF Core migrations are needed (document-based storage)
assertions.rationale: Explicitly states 'No EF Core migrations needed. Storage is document-based'.

assertions.assertion: Shows IDatabaseSchema.CreateIfNotExistsAsync() for automatic schema creation
assertions.rationale: Shows the full code with `await schema.CreateIfNotExistsAsync()`.
